trap: In 5e 2014 Rangers had no spells at level 1. Bare models say Hunter's Mark is unavailable at level 1. In D&D 2024 Rangers prepare 2 spells at level 1 and Hunter's Mark is on their level-1 spell list.
prompt: Is Hunter's Mark available for a level 1 Ranger to prepare in D&D 2024?

oracle.trap_answer: No — Rangers don't cast spells until level 2 (5e 2014 rule)
oracle.source: catalog: spellsByClass.ranger includes hunters-mark at level 1
